site.name: Chief Chukwuonye Movement
site.tagline: From Neglect to Development — It's Okigwe's Time
site.description: Join the Chief Chukwuonye Movement — a grassroots campaign to restore dignity, deliver real development, and ensure Okigwe Zone is finally represented with purpose and results.

contact.whatsappMessage: I want to Join the Chief Chinedu Movement.
